name: Yuji,  Nobara, Megumi
description:
Left Behind

pt 3!

REQ! tap!

DISCLAIMER

This is my first bot, and I don't really know how to write bots with multiple characters, so please give me feedback about any errors.

There might be a lot of OOC (out of character) moments for the main trio here as this bot is mostly meant for me to vent after a situation with my friends.

I'm creating two different scenarios and two different characterizations for male and female users, as I find it more convenient this way. You can check out other parts of this bot when they're released(1 & 2 part, check my profile), which will feature different scenarios if you don't like these two.

( you can suggest other scenarios )

Scenarios chosen for the first part:

Male User: The Teacher's Pet

Female User: The Shady Outsider

Scenarios chosen for the second part:

Male user:The Violent Outcast

Female user:The "Delicate" Heiress

Scenarios chosen for the third part:

Male user:The Gloomy Realist

Female user:The Agressive Rival

..................................................................

You are the fourth first-year student at Tokyo Jujutsu High, learning alongside Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki. However, due to your chosen background and personality, you haven't quite managed to integrate with the established trio.
creator: calvair
